next_action: Resume discuss-phase for Phase 5 — clarify and answer the web search mechanism question (claude --allowedTools vs Claude Code triggers vs You decide), then continue with remaining 3 gray areas: Insight actioning, Domain coverage, Research lifecycle
context_notes: Phase 5 has significant existing infrastructure: gsd-researcher-nightly.sh script, cron installed at 01:35 UTC, 3 research artifacts already in .planning/research/, domain rotation (Mon/Thu=standards, Tue/Fri=python-ecosystem, Wed/Sat=ai-tooling, Sun=synthesis). Discussion is about closing gaps: web search for fast-moving domains, insight actioning workflow, domain coverage expansion, and research lifecycle automation. The codebase scout revealed schedule-tasks.yaml, setup-cron.sh, notify.sh, workstation-lib.sh as key integration points.
